MODULE: cosmos.integration.external.twitter
FILE: cosmos/integration/external/twitter.py (97 lines)
CATEGORY: integration

DESCRIPTION: cosmos X (Twitter) Integration.

"Good news everyone! I'm trending!"

Features:
1. Post Updates: Tweeting directly from the agent.
2. Monitor mentions: Reacting to user interactions.

CLASSES:
- XProvider(ExternalProvider)
  Methods: async def connect(self) -> bool
  Methods: async def sync(self)
  Methods: async def execute_action(self, action: str, params: Dict[str, Any]) -> Any
